Body.Content:
Extending support for modern Excel workbooks stored on your device to Agent Mode in Excel, giving users the flexibility to use multi-step editing capabilities with Copilot in Excel no matter whether files are stored locally or in the cloud.

GA date: March CY2026

Extending support for modern Excel workbooks stored on your device to Agent Mode in Excel, giving users the flexibility to use multi-step editing capabilities with Copilot in Excel no matter whether files are stored locally or in the cloud.

GA date: March CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Local file support for Agent Mode in Excel
